Nimbus

Give £10, Get £10

Invite your friends to Nimbus and you will both receive £10 in cloud storage credit. It is that simple.

How It Works

1

Share Your Link

Send your unique referral link to friends via email or social media.

2

Friend Signs Up

Your friend creates a Nimbus account using your referral link.

3

You Both Save

You each receive £10 credit applied to your next billing cycle.

Your Referral Code

NIMBUS-XK7F92

 Share Now (https://nimbus.example.com/refer?code=NIMBUS-XK7F92)

Your Referral Stats

Friends Referred

3

Credits Earned

£30.00

Referral credits are applied automatically when your friend completes registration and adds a payment method. Credits expire 12 months from the date of issue. Maximum 20 referrals per account per calendar year. Nimbus reserves the right to modify or discontinue the referral programme at any time. Full terms at nimbus.example.com/referral-terms.

Nimbus Cloud Storage Ltd - London, UK

You are receiving this because you are a Nimbus subscriber.
